name: Reinforcements
official_rules_text: At the start of the End Phase of the first Round, a Unit with the Reinforcements keyword may make a Speed-1 Move.If a unit with the Mobile keyword makes more than 1 non-compulsory Move action during its Activation, it may not claim Asset tokens that Activation. Additionally, a unit with the Mobile keyword that has claimed an Asset token can make only 1 non-compulsory Move action during its Activation.
description: At the start of the End Phase of the first Round, a Unit with the Reinforcements keyword may make a Speed-1 Move.If a unit with the Mobile keyword makes more than 1 non-compulsory Move action during its Activation, it may not claim Asset tokens that Activation.
